zh.lifeSummary: 當Herbaren II van Arkel於大約1205年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德藍格拉可時，他的父親Floris Herbaren van der Lede36歲，母親Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven27歲。他和Aleidis van Heusden至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1258年之前。

zh-hans.Maastricht, Limburg, Netherlands: 荷兰利包格馬亞斯特利希特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Herbaren II van Arkel于大约1205年出生在荷兰-拉藍德藍格拉可时，他的父亲Floris Herbaren van der Lede36岁，母亲Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven27岁。他和Aleidis van Heusden至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1258年之前。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Arkel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton: from the Old Breton personal name Arthmael, composed of the elements arth ‘bear’ (in a transferred sense ‘soldier’) + mael ‘prince’, Latinized as Armagilus. This was the name of a Christian saint (5th century) who was the subject of a local cult in Brittany.
Jewish (from Ukraine): artificial name from Yiddish dialect (h)arml ‘hermine’.

variants.name: Ermel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Jurgen, Markus, Matthias.

German: from Middle High German ermel ‘sleeve’, a metonymic occupational name for a sleeve maker. Alternatively, it may have been a nickname for someone who wore clothing with conspicuous sleeves; in medieval times the size of sleeves was regulated by luxury laws.
German: from a pet form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names formed with Erm, from erm, irm ‘all-encompassing, great’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace). Compare Armel 1.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Herbaren II van Arkel was born about 1205, in Langerak, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Floris Herbaren van der Lede, was 36 and his mother, Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven, was 27. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Aleidis van Heusden. He died before 1258.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herbaren II van Arkel est né environ 1205, à Langerak, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Floris Herbaren van der Lede, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Aleidis van Heusden. Il est décédé avant 1258.

de.lifeSummary: Als Herbaren II van Arkel um 1205 in Langerak, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Floris Herbaren van der Lede 36 und seine Mutter Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven 27. Er hatte mit Aleidis van Heusden mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 1258.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Herbaren II van Arkel è nato il circa 1205 nel Langerak, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Floris Herbaren van der Lede, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Aleidis van Heusden. Morì prima del 1258.

ja.lifeSummary: Herbaren II van Arkelが約1205年にオランダズイド-hオランドランジャーアクで生まれた時，父Floris Herbaren van der Ledeは36歳，母Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhovenは27歳であった。彼はAleidis van Heusdenとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1258年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Herbaren II van Arkel(이)가 대략 1205년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 랭라크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Floris Herbaren van der Lede(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Aleidis van Heusden(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1258년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herbaren II van Arkel nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Langerak, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Floris Herbaren van der Lede, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Aleidis van Heusden. Ele faleceu antes 1258.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herbaren II van Arkel родился около 1205 г. в местности лангирак, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Floris Herbaren van der Lede было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven, 27. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Aleidis van Heusden. Он умер перед 1258 г.

sm.about 1205–before 1258: e tusa o le 1205–a'e le'I oo le 1258

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Herbaren II van Arkel nació aproximadamente 1205, en Langerak, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Floris Herbaren van der Lede, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Aleidis van Heusden. Murió antes de 1258.
